name: clipboard-workflow-helper
description: Auto unselect after copy, auto timeline entry creation, and shortcuts for Claude Code workflow

commands.title: Select All (with Ctrl+C timeout for timeline)
Copy, Select All and Create Timeline Entry
Paste Screenshot to Terminal (for Claude Code)

clipboardHelper.ctrlACtrlCTimeout.description: Time in milliseconds to wait for Ctrl+C after Ctrl+A to trigger Copy+Timeline. Set to 0 to disable.

clipboardHelper.backgroundTaskIntervalMi.description: Interval in minutes for background task to recover missing titles from cache. Min: 1, Max: 60 minutes.

clipboardHelper.pasteImagePrefix.description: Text prefix before file path when pasting to terminal

clipboardHelper.screenshotRetentionDays.description: Delete screenshots older than X days. Set to 0 to disable cleanup.

clipboardHelper.autoDetectScreenshot.description: Auto-detect new screenshots in clipboard (monitors clipboard in background)

clipboardHelper.clipboardCheckIntervalMs.description: How often to check clipboard for new images (in milliseconds)

scripts.pretest: npm run compile && npm run lint
